what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment record that associates attachment id att-aec84fda with board item item-5ccd457c in the dragnet-development channel, using the board_items attachment type and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-5ccd457c.
No body content beyond the frontmatter.
standouts: The target is a board://item-... URI, making this a cross-entity link record.
The file name matches the id in the frontmatter.
conventions: File naming matches the attachment id.
Timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
notes: A lightweight metadata stub that links a channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or data does the referenced board item hold?
Is the board:// URI resolvable elsewhere in the system?
What operations consume or update this attachment record?
intention_signals: It appears intended to persist a typed relationship between a channel attachment and a board item, enabling traceability from a channel context to a board artifact.
contribution: It contributes a durable, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, including a creation timestamp, which a fused system could use to reconstruct channel-board relationships.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type board_items linking attachment att-aec84fda in dragnet-development to board item item-5ccd457c with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: This file was created to record that a specific board item is attached to a channel attachment in the dragnet-development channel.
